degraded.detail: classify_complexity flagged touches_migrations from message prose only (the fixture spec narrates 'database persistence'); overridden -- the diff has zero SQL / supabase/migrations paths (compliance collectors + a JSON schema + tests). F11 recomputes risk flags from the diff.

surface_verification.justification: Compliance data collector: the execution-evidence reader (execution_evidence.py + _execution_evidence_io.py) emits a generated JSON index consumed by the test_links manifest, plus a JSON schema, F5.md docs, and their tests. No startable user-experienceable surface (no web/API/CLI app affordance); detect_frontend_changes has_frontend_changes=false. Fully exercised by the compliance pytest suite at F0 (1056 GREEN incl. order-forced test_enforcement_hooks-first, ADR-045) plus empirical CLI + round-trip boundary probes recorded in the iterate ADR.

behaviors.behavior: AC1 the reader maps JUnit XML / Playwright JSON / Vitest reporter to per-test {status,executed,runner} over the P1 fixtures and reproduces the panel-verified evidence_index answer key exactly
AC1/R1 a skipped tagged test is status=skipped, executed=not_run; JUnit failure/error children map to fail, skipped child to not_run (fail-closed)
AC1 reader keys are the collector stable path::name id (posix, no backslash); the emitted index validates against the evidence-index v2 schema
AC2 the CORE R1 regression: an FR whose only required-layer test is skipped has coverage MISSING even on a green run; enabled+pass yields ok
AC2 the coverage predicate: only status=enabled AND executed=pass yields ok; skipped/fail/not_run/quarantined/only never do; one real pass among skips suffices
AC3 a missing evidence file resolves every tested layer to not_run and no coverage to ok (never a self-reported pass); a report that omits a required test keeps it not_run -> MISSING
AC3 (review C1/H1) a regen with no fresh raw report does NOT trust a prior run's stale index: generate_file falls back to not_run/MISSING
AC3 the expiring waiver is honored while valid and fails when expired; an incomplete/malformed waiver is invalid (not honored); layer_satisfied fails closed without a valid waiver

AC4 the status/executed vocab is a validated frozen boundary: out-of-vocab (executed:'passed', status:'active') is coerced fail-closed at ingestion; the schema rejects out-of-vocab + extra keys; code vocab cannot drift from the schema enums
Review C2/H2 operator-authored expiring waivers survive a machine-results refresh and normalization (not silently dropped) so the layer gate can honor them

Review C4/P4 fail-closed reduction: a duplicate test id (retry/shard/project) never lets a pass mask a failure; a Playwright retry that eventually passes is pass, an all-failed spec is fail; an oversized JUnit report fails closed to empty
Finalization wiring: refresh_index is non-destructive when no reports (leaves an existing index) and freshness-stamps generated_at + source_reports when it emits

Review R2-1 (HIGH, code+doubt) Playwright multi-project: a spec's tests[] is one entry PER PROJECT (browser); the reader reduces each project then combines FAIL-CLOSED (chromium pass + firefox fail -> executed=fail -> coverage.e2e=MISSING), never the false-green 'any result passed -> pass'

Review R2-2 (HIGH, code) path/id normalization: an absolute Vitest testResults[].name strips to the project-root-relative id and joins; a per-plugin pytest JUnit file rebases via an explicit base -> real evidence actually joins (not silent all-MISSING)
Review R2-3 (HIGH, bot) CLI path-traversal: main() confines every --junit/--playwright/--vitest/--out path to project_root, rejecting a ..-traversal or an absolute path outside the root

Review R2-4/R2-5 pytest parametrized JUnit names ([param]) fold to the function-level @covers id fail-closed (any param fail -> fail); a truncated/corrupt JSON report is skipped fail-closed instead of crashing the whole update_compliance regen

Review R2-6 (doubt) _make_link coerces an unknown/forged evidence status to quarantined (NOT enabled), so status:'active'+executed:'pass' cannot claim coverage ok; R2-7 read_vitest failed/skipped/todo branches

AC5 footprint: source split across _evidence_vocab (62) / _evidence_readers (160) / execution_evidence (155) / _execution_evidence_io (162); tests 217/230/120; ALL <=300 LOC; bloat baseline not ratcheted; TT1 collector suite still green (no fork)
behaviors.evidence: structural: wc -l all <=300; shipwright_bloat_baseline.json unchanged in the diff; compliance suite 1056 GREEN (enforcement-hooks forced first) + shared golden-consistency 3 GREEN
